name: social-content-mastery
description: Complete social content creation knowledge engine for personal brands and creators. Covers brand foundation, content strategy, hook writing, scripting, video production, editing, visual content, platform strategy, growth, monetization, brand partnerships, community building, and AI workflows. Built from 5 extraction files covering 9 courses across ~75 hours of instruction from Mino Lee, Dickie Bush & Nicholas Cole, Gusten Sun, Colin & Samir, Sky Stack, Anton Mehto, Parker Walbeck, Kallaway, Nicklas Christl, Bob Krist, Justas/Instapreneur, Marketing Harry/Frabrand, and Creators Club.
